author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: 26 integration tests covering end-to-end training graphs (linear regression, multi-layer relu network), thread safety (backward across threads, AC-12), no_grad context, edge cases (zero-element, rank-8, scalar item), numerical gradient checks (mul, pow, sqrt, sigmoid, tanh, relu, div, chain rule), creation edge cases, f64 operations. Total: 203 tests (176 unit + 26 integration + 1 doctest), all passing.
